title: WizStacks32
description: Makes all item stacks 32 instead of the vanilla stack limit
body:
The mod makes every item stackable to 32 instead of their normal stack value, for example potions are now stackable to 32 instead of 1 and iron ingots are now also 32 instead of 64.

This mod was made for fun and I wanted to share it with the world!

This mod gives both a buff to items that are normally under the 32 stack size and a nerf to all items that are above the 32 normal stacksize.
